item.title: Organic Forging from Tubing
item.description: A blacksmithing look at organic forging from tubing, focusing on shaping, heat, and traditional metalwork technique.

media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing look at organic forging from tubing, focusing on shaping, heat, and traditional metalwork technique.

item.title: Butterfly Hinges: Fit and Movement
item.description: The fit and movement are the satisfying part here—watch it come together in this blacksmithing and metalworking process.

media:content.media:description: The fit and movement are the satisfying part here—watch it come together in this blacksmithing and metalworking process.

item.title: Simple Tool Restoration in the Forge
